chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 594 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 09.10.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Case is fixed for non-prosecution. Accordingly, it is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
